metadata.name: Pihole
metadata.description: Network-wide DNS-based ad and tracker blocker that acts as a DNS sinkhole. Filters content at the DNS level for all devices on your network.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Network-wide DNS-based ad and tracker blocker that acts as a DNS sinkhole. Filters content at the DNS level for all devices on your network.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on stack naming, networking, ports, and persistent storage before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in required service settings first, then enable optional integrations such as Traefik, databases, or metrics only when needed.
3. Render the stack files, review placement and secret handling, and deploy them with Docker Swarm in the target environment.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Service Name; optional; default: pihole.
- `container_hostname`: Container Hostname; optional.
- `container_timezone`: Container Timezone; optional.
- `user_uid`: User Uid; optional; default: 1000.
- `user_gid`: User Gid; optional; default: 1000.

### Admin Settings
- `webpassword`: Web interface admin password; optional.

### Ports
- `ports_dns`: DNS port for Pi-hole; required; default: 53.
- `ports_http`: HTTP port for Pi-hole; optional; default: 80.
- `ports_https`: HTTPS port for Pi-hole; optional; default: 443.
- `ports_ntp`: External NTP port; required; default: 123.

### Traefik
- `traefik_host`: Traefik Host; optional; default: pihole.
- `traefik_network`: Traefik Network; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_domain`: Traefik Domain; required; default: home.arpa.
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.

### Traefik TLS
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.

### Network
- `network_mode`: Network Mode; optional.
- `network_name`: Network Name; optional; default: pihole_network.
- `network_macvlan_ipv4_address`: Network Macvlan Ipv4 Address; required; default: 192.0.2.11; shown when: network_mode=macvlan.
- `network_macvlan_parent_interface`: Network Macvlan Parent Interface; required; default: eth0; shown when: network_mode=macvlan.
- `network_macvlan_subnet`: Network Macvlan Subnet; required; default: 192.0.2.0/24; shown when: network_mode=macvlan.
- `network_macvlan_gateway`: Network Macvlan Gateway; required; default: 192.0.2.1; shown when: network_mode=macvlan.
- `network_external`: Whether the network is external; optional; default: false.

### Docker Swarm
- `swarm_placement_host`: Swarm Placement Host; required.

### Volume
- `volume_mode`: Volume Mode; required; default: local; options: local, mount, nfs.
- `volume_mount_path`: Volume Mount Path; required; default: /path/to/storage; shown when: volume_mode=mount.
- `volume_nfs_server`: Volume Nfs Server; required; default: 192.0.2.1; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.
- `volume_nfs_path`: Volume Nfs Path; required; default: /path/to/export; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.
- `volume_nfs_options`: Volume Nfs Options; required; default: rw,nolock,soft; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.

## References
- [Pi-hole](https://pi-hole.net/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.pi-hole.net/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/pi-hole/pi-hole)
## Notes
- Pi-hole does NOT support multiple replicas. This template enforces a single instance with node placement constraints to ensure stable DNS resolution.

## Next Steps
Log in with your initial admin user:
```bash
Username: admin
Password: << webpassword >>
```
